transcript: Customer: This is an emergency, my package unit froze up with ice on the lines and it's getting bad! This is Gary Olsen at 640 Willow Way. Dispatcher: Okay Gary, stay calm. I'm getting a technician dispatched to 640 Willow Way right now. Customer: Please hurry. Dispatcher: A tech is on the way, they'll call you when they're close.

expected_entities.issue: emergency: package unit froze up with ice on the lines
